'''鈭歝h-l-s-w''' ('''kachalsewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:telnet|telnet]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-l-s-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:telnet|telnet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-l-s-w
|-
! Lemma
| kachalsewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichalsewoko|thichalsewoko]] || [[word:jichalsewoko|jichalsewoko]] || [[word:shichalsewoko|shichalsewoko]] || [[word:kichalsewoko|kichalsewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchalsewoko|thuthuchalsewoko]] || [[word:jujuchalsewoko|jujuchalsewoko]] || [[word:shushuchalsewoko|shushuchalsewoko]] || [[word:kukuchalsewoko|kukuchalsewoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chalsewoko|th忙chalsewoko]] || [[word:j忙chalsewoko|j忙chalsewoko]] || [[word:sh忙chalsewoko|sh忙chalsewoko]] || [[word:k忙chalsewoko|k忙chalsewoko]]
|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
